name: Chris Benoit
title: Last known photo of Chris Benoit, taken on June 22, 2007, posing with a fan at his physician Dr. Phil Astin's office in Carrollton, Georgia — believed to have been taken after he had already murdered his wife Nancy.
description: The last known photo of Chris Benoit was taken on June 22, 2007, showing him posing with a fan at the office of his personal physician, Dr. Phil Astin, in Carrollton, Georgia, near Atlanta. At the time this photo was taken, it is believed Benoit had already murdered his wife Nancy. On June 25, 2007, police entered Benoit's home in Fayetteville, Georgia, and discovered three bodies. Benoit had killed his wife Nancy on June 22, their seven-year-old son Daniel on June 23, and then took his own life on June 24 by hanging. Investigators found anabolic steroids in the home, and a subsequent examination of Benoit's brain revealed severe chronic traumatic encephalopathy (CTE) from years of untreated concussions. He was 40 years old. WWE removed nearly all references to Benoit from their programming following the tragedy.
bio: Chris Benoit was a Canadian professional wrestler known for his technical skill and intensity. He held world championships in both WWE and WCW during his two-decade career.

location.name: Dr. Phil Astin's Office, 702 Dixie St, Carrollton, GA 30117
